summary: This update adds a new "Gifts in Inbox" feature that collects recently discovered gift links into a dedicated inbox tab, a batch of Better Marketplace tools (value & trap columns, quick price links, and tariff info), improvements to Paste Hunter ID and Better Journal loot parsing, and a batch of style and reliability fixes.

details.title: Gifts in Inbox
items: Added a new feature that adds recently discovered MouseHunt gift links to a "Gift Links" tab in the inbox for easy claiming
Tracks which links you've claimed or hidden so the list stays manageable

details.title: Better Marketplace
items: Added a sortable "Value" column (owned × average price) and a total estimated value readout when browsing a category
Added a "Filter by trap" dropdown to the Skins category so you can narrow skins to a single base trap
Added quick "Undercut"/"Overbid" price links, quick quantity buttons, and a "Sell All But One" link to the item listing view
Added a raw/tax breakdown to order rows and highlighting of the last item you viewed in each category

details.title: Paste Hunter ID
items: Added support for pasting a full "profile.php?snuid=" link to go directly to that hunter's profile
Works with both numeric and hashed snuid values

details.title: Better Journal
items: Added a generic loot list fallback to parse bullet-separated loot entries, such as Spotlight Enchantment and "found an additional" entries

details.title: Better UI
items: Added the new "Gift Links" tab to the inbox and reordered the inbox tabs
Updated gift claim and inbox styles

details.title: Other
items: Image Upscaling & Transparency: Fixed images not being re-upscaled when the game re-renders an entry back to its original image
Location HUDs - Fort Rox: Updated styles
Miscellaneous UI improvements and bug fixes
